profile.headline: Platform Engineer
profile.summary: Experienced engineer. Designed distributed systems and high-throughput APIs on a microservices platform, owned reliability and on-call for production services at scale. Built and operated databases and message queues handling millions of requests with strong SLAs.

profile.headline: Software Engineer
profile.summary: Builder. Architected the network of services that keep the product running under heavy load, and was the person paged when anything broke, keeping it dependable. Ran the storage and messaging backbone that absorbs huge traffic without falling over.
